title: desmodium spirale var. annuum
intro: Desmodium spirale var. annuum, also known as the annual tick clover, is a perennial plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Desmodium spirale var. annuum is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, and can also be used in ointments or creams for topical application.
